# Digital Craft Tbilisi — Full Content

> Digital Craft is a web development and SEO agency based in Tbilisi, Georgia. We design and build high-performance websites for businesses in Georgia and the South Caucasus region. Our clients range from local Georgian SMEs to international businesses entering the Caucasus market. We combine modern frontend technology with measurable SEO outcomes.

**Website:** https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site  
**Location:** Tbilisi, Georgia  
**Contact:** +995 591 102 653 | WhatsApp: https://wa.me/79119396075 | Telegram: https://t.me/ramashery  
**Languages served:** English, Russian, Georgian  
**Markets:** Georgia (primary), Azerbaijan (secondary)

---

## About

Digital Craft is a boutique web agency focused on the Georgian and regional market. The agency builds websites that function as active business tools — not just digital brochures. The core philosophy: a website must attract clients and generate revenue, not just exist online.

The agency works with Georgian businesses of all sizes — restaurants, medical clinics, e-commerce stores, service providers, and expats launching businesses in Georgia. Projects are built on modern technology stacks including Single-Page Applications (SPA), Firebase backends, and custom CMS solutions. SEO is integrated from day one, not added as an afterthought.

---

## Services

### Custom Web Development

URL: https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/services/custom-web-development-tbilisi/

Digital Craft builds custom websites and web applications tailored to the Georgian market. Services include:

- **Landing pages** — conversion-optimized single-page sites for product launches, ads, and lead generation.
- **Multi-page business websites** — full corporate sites with service pages, blog, portfolio, and contact sections.
- **E-commerce platforms** — custom online stores with product catalogs, payment integration, and inventory management.
- **Single-Page Applications (SPA)** — dynamic web apps with Firebase backend, real-time data, and custom admin CMS.
- **Mobile-responsive design** — all projects are optimized for mobile devices, which account for the majority of Georgian web traffic.

Technology stack: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (vanilla and frameworks), Firebase (Firestore, Auth, Hosting), custom CMS, SEO-ready architecture.

### SEO Optimization

URL: https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/services/seo-optimization-tbilisi/

Digital Craft provides technical and content SEO specifically calibrated for the Georgian search market. Services include:

- **Technical SEO audit** — crawl analysis, page speed optimization, indexation issues, redirect chains, structured data.
- **On-page optimization** — H1/H2 hierarchy, meta titles and descriptions, keyword density, internal linking.
- **Hreflang implementation** — correct setup for multilingual Georgian websites (.ge domains), handling Georgian, Russian, and English language versions.
- **Canonical tags** — preventing duplicate content issues common in Georgian e-commerce and multi-language sites.
- **Keyword research** — identifying high-intent search queries used by Georgian consumers in Georgian, Russian, and English.
- **Content strategy** — editorial planning and SEO content creation for the Georgian market.
- **Local SEO** — Google Business Profile optimization, local citations, Tbilisi-specific geographic targeting.

---

## Portfolio

### Tech Case Study: This Portfolio Website

URL: https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/portfolio/tech-case-study-this-portfolio/

A detailed technical breakdown of the Digital Craft agency website itself. The site is built as a Single-Page Application using vanilla JavaScript, with a Firebase Firestore backend. Key features:

- Custom CMS built in-house for managing blog posts, portfolio items, and service pages.
- Dynamic SEO: each route generates unique meta tags, Open Graph data, and canonical URLs without a traditional server.
- Firebase Hosting with CDN delivery for fast load times within Georgia.
- Structured data (schema.org) for LocalBusiness and BlogPosting types.

This case study serves as a live demonstration of the agency's technical capabilities.

### Minankari.art E-commerce

URL: https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/portfolio/case-study-minankari-art-ecommerce/

A custom e-commerce platform built for a Georgian artist specializing in cloisonné enamel (minankari) — a traditional Georgian craft. The project targets both local Georgian buyers and an international audience.

Key features:
- Product catalog with high-resolution image galleries optimized for artwork presentation.
- Multilingual interface (Georgian, English, Russian).
- International payment integration.
- SEO configured for global reach, targeting queries related to Georgian traditional art and handmade jewelry.

---

## Blog

### Your Website: An Asset or an Expense?

URL: https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/why-your-website-should-be-a-marketing-tool/  
Category: Business Growth Strategy

Most websites built for Georgian businesses fail to attract clients. Common reasons: poor SEO foundation, no call-to-action strategy, outdated design, slow load times, and lack of local keyword targeting. This article explains how to reframe a website as a 24/7 sales tool rather than a static brochure, covering conversion principles, trust signals, and measurable KPIs for Georgian SMEs.

### How to Create a Restaurant Website in Tbilisi

URL: https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/restaurant-website-tbilisi/  
Category: Business & Marketing

A comprehensive guide for restaurant owners in Tbilisi considering a website. Topics covered: essential pages (menu, reservations, location, about), local SEO for food businesses in Georgia, integration with online booking systems, Google Maps optimization, photo strategy for Georgian cuisine, and realistic pricing ranges for 2026.

### 7 Critical SEO Mistakes in Georgia

URL: https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/7-critical-seo-mistakes-in-georgia/  
Category: SEO Audit & Strategy

Analysis of the seven most common SEO errors found on Georgian websites. Mistakes include: ignoring Georgian-language SEO in favor of Russian only, missing hreflang tags on multilingual sites, no structured data, slow page speeds, duplicate content across language versions, thin service page content, and lack of local citation building.

### Black Hat SEO: The Shortcuts That Can Ban Your Website

URL: https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/black-hat-seo-risks-georgia/  
Category: SEO & Digital Strategy

A guide to recognizing and avoiding black hat SEO in the Georgian market. Covers 12 banned techniques including PBN link schemes, keyword stuffing, cloaking, and fake review generation. Explains how to identify unethical SEO contractors operating in Georgia and what Google penalties look like. Essential reading before hiring an SEO agency in Georgia.

### Website Launch Checklist in Georgia

URL: https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/website-launch-checklist-georgia/  
Category: For Businesses & Expats

A 10-point pre-launch checklist for business owners and expats launching a website in Georgia. Items include: Google Search Console setup, robots.txt and sitemap submission, mobile responsiveness verification, page speed benchmarks, SSL certificate, 404 error sweep, hreflang validation for multilingual sites, and Google Analytics configuration.

### Landing Page vs. Website: Which Do You Need?

URL: https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/landing-page-vs-website/  
Published: 26.12.2025

A decision framework for Georgian businesses choosing between a single landing page and a full multi-page website. Compares conversion rates, SEO potential, development costs, and maintenance requirements. Recommends landing pages for paid ad campaigns and product launches; full websites for long-term SEO and brand authority.

### The Art of Keyword Research for Businesses in Georgia

URL: https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/the-art-of-keyword-research-in-georgia/  
Published: 01.08.2025  
Category: SEO Guide

Practical guide to keyword research for the Georgian market. Covers: language choice (Georgian vs. Russian vs. English for different query types), tools for Georgian keyword data, understanding search intent in the local market, long-tail keyword strategies for Tbilisi businesses, and competitor keyword analysis techniques.

### SEO & Content Marketing in Georgia

URL: https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/content-marketing-and-seo-in-georgia/  
Published: 17.12.2025

Comprehensive guide to winning local search in Georgia through content. Topics: multilingual content strategy for .ge domains, Georgian consumer search behavior, language-specific keyword mapping, technical SEO requirements unique to Georgian websites (encoding, hreflang, Cyrillic vs. Georgian script handling), and editorial calendar planning.

### SEO for Medical Clinics in Georgia

URL: https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/seo-for-medical-clinics-georgia/  
Published: 16.12.2025

A specialized guide for healthcare providers in Georgia. Covers ethical SEO practices for YMYL (Your Money Your Life) content, building online trust signals for medical websites, managing clinic reputation on Georgian review platforms, local SEO for multi-location clinics in Tbilisi, and schema markup for medical organizations.

### E-commerce SEO in Georgia: A Market Guide

URL: https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/ecommerce-seo-georgia-market-guide/  
Published: 12.08.2025

Analysis of Georgia's e-commerce landscape based on TBC Capital data. Only 3–4% of Georgian companies operate online stores, representing a major opportunity. Covers: product page SEO, category page optimization, hreflang for Georgian e-commerce, dealing with thin content on large catalogs, and capturing market share in a low-competition environment.

### When to Start SEO: The Most Expensive Mistake

URL: https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/when-to-start-seo/  
Published: 15.12.2025

Argues against the common Georgian business practice of launching a website first and adding SEO later. Explains how retrofitting SEO costs significantly more in time and money than building SEO architecture into the site from the start. Covers information architecture, URL structure decisions, and CMS selection from an SEO perspective.

### The Ultimate Guide to Websites for Businesses in Azerbaijan

URL: https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/web-development-azerbaijan/  
Published: 20.12.2025

A market-specific guide for businesses launching or improving websites in Azerbaijan. Covers the Azerbaijani web market landscape, Baku-specific local SEO, Azerbaijani language SEO considerations, hosting choices for az-domain websites, and cost benchmarks for web development in Baku in 2025–2026.

### Duplicate Content: The Hidden SEO Killer

URL: https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/duplicate-content-seo-audit-georgia/  
Category: Technical SEO Audit Guide

Explains how duplicate content suppresses Google rankings, with a focus on patterns common in Georgian websites: auto-generated language versions without hreflang, identical service pages for different cities, and e-commerce sites with filtered URL parameters. Includes a step-by-step audit checklist and a real case study showing +63% organic traffic increase after duplicate content remediation.

### Technical SEO Checklist for Georgia

URL: https://digital-craft-tbilisi.site/en/blog/technical-seo-checklist-georgia/

14 technical requirements for launching a website that ranks in Georgia. Items: canonical tag implementation, hreflang for .ge multilingual sites, redirect chain resolution, Core Web Vitals benchmarks, structured data, XML sitemap, robots.txt configuration, HTTPS, mobile-first indexing readiness, and crawl budget optimization.
